channel.description: USEFUL LINKS https://github.com/Berkanktk/CyberSecurity?tab=readme-ov-file#links ACTIVE CLUB REPOS ARCHIVED CLUB REPOS 2026 eMERGE Project Scalpel Hackathon - Cowrie Honeypot with Hybrid Edge AI https://github.com/RohanDS2024/Emirge https://github.com/caol777/CCDC-scripts https://github.com/caol777/Cowrie-honeypot
